Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 17 

DIALYS_BENE_PMT 

LABEL: Dialysis Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments for Part B dialysis services (primarily the professional 
component since treatments are covered in hospital outpatient) for a given year. The total Beneficiary 
payments are calculated as the sum of LINE_COINSRNC_AMT + LINE_BENE_PTB_DDCTBL_AMT for the 
relevant
